source_pr.title: update ambiguous check
source_pr.body:
- Use CheckReferAmbiguous to check fields ambiguous uniformly. 
- Fix panic when adding hidden aggregate field.
- Fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/337

symptoms: mustExecMatch(c, se, "select c1 as a, c1 as b from t order by c1", [][]interface{}{{1, 1}, {2, 2}}) (tidb_test.go)
failure_signature: mustExecMatch(c, se, "select c1 as a, c1 as b from t order by c1", [][]interface{}{{1, 1}, {2, 2}}) (tidb_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: mustExecMatch(c, se, "select c1 as a, c1 as b from t order by c1", [][]interface{}{{1, 1}, {2, 2}}) (tidb_test.go)
files: expression/helper.go, field/result_field.go, plan/plans/select_list.go, plan/plans/select_list_test.go, rset/rsets/groupby.go, rset/rsets/groupby_test.go, rset/rsets/orderby.go, tidb_test.go
